theme_rankings.tagline: 🤖 크립토 버전 AI 베팅 — 분산 컴퓨팅·에이전트
theme_rankings.why_now: AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출. 미국 AI 주식 테마와 동행 흐름.
theme_rankings.risk: 내러티브 의존도 큼. 실수요 검증 아직 미흡. 알트 변동성 폭.

theme_rankings.why_now: 거버넌스보단 실제 트래픽·결제 사용처. TON·BNB 일일 활성 유저 검증.
theme_rankings.risk: 투기 대비 변동성 낮지만 폭발력도 작음. 환희장에서 underperform.

theme_rankings.why_now: 기관 자금 유입 가장 빠른 영역. BlackRock·Franklin 등 진입.
theme_rankings.risk: 규제 의존적. 거시 금리 환경 변화 시 단기 자금 이탈 가능.

theme_rankings.why_now: 토큰 가격은 하락했지만 매출 폭증 중. AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출 직접.
theme_rankings.risk: 토큰 인플레이션 압력 + 사용자 보상 의존. 베어 마켓에서 매도 압력 큼.

theme_rankings.why_now: 실제 매출 + 토큰 보유자 환원. P/S 가시화로 밸류에이션 재평가 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 스마트컨트랙트 위험 + 규제. 매출은 시장 변동성에 큰 폭으로 변동.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🥇 시장 방향성 기준 — 비트는 디지털 금, 이더는 인프라
theme_rankings.why_now: BTC ETF 자금 유입, ETH 스테이킹 + L2 매출. 알트 사이클의 출발점.
theme_rankings.risk: 거시 유동성·금리에 직접 노출. ETF 자금 흐름이 단기 방향성을 좌우.

theme_rankings.tagline: 📈 ETF 승인 후보 + 이더 L2 — 기관 매집 영역
theme_rankings.why_now: SOL·LTC ETF 가능성 + L2 거래량 회복. 다음 cycle 메이저 후보.
theme_rankings.risk: ETF 미승인 시 단기 조정. L2는 fee market 경쟁 심화.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🌐 검증된 L1 — 이더 외 실수요 입증된 체인들
theme_rankings.why_now: 솔라나 압도적 점유 + 신흥 L1(Sui·Aptos)도 자금 유입. 생태계 prop value 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: L1 간 경쟁 격화. 사용자·개발자 이탈 시 멀티플 빠르게 축소.

narrative.summary: Ondo: 정량 종합 54점, 라벨 HOLD. 단기 51 / 중기 69 / 장기 42. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)

top_news.title: Blackstone Said to Be in Talks to Buy Canada Property Firm H&R REIT
top_news.summary: Blackstone Inc. is in discussions with Canada’s H&R Real Estate Investment Trust about a potential acquisition, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

top_news.title: Freimane on SpaceX, Renewables, Energy Opportunities
top_news.summary: Norrsken VC General Partner Agate Freimane speaks with Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie from the Founders Forum in Oxfordshire, UK. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Asian Stocks to Gain as Trump Signals US-Iran Deal: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Stocks in Asia were set to advance Friday, tracking a rally on Wall Street after President Donald Trump said the US was nearing an agreement with Iran, raising hopes for a diplomatic end to a conflict that has rattled global markets.

top_news.title: Gold Jumps After Trump Signals US-Iran Truce Deal Is Close
top_news.summary: Gold jumped the most in more than two months after US President Donald Trump said he canceled planned military strikes against Iran, fueling hopes for a diplomatic way out of the war that has rattled global markets.

top_news.title: CME Announces Plans to Offer 24/7 WTI Oil and Gold Contracts
top_news.summary: The Chicago Mercantile Group announced plans to offer 24-hour, seven-days-a-week trading in new, smaller crude oil futures and its existing gold contract, the exchange said Thursday.

top_news.title: Who’s Really Paying for This Year’s World Cup?
top_news.summary: Want to see the World Cup final? That’ll be $10,000. Bloomberg’s Big Take host David Gura and Vanessa Perdomo get into dynamic pricing and surging costs for host countries as the games kick off. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: EM Currencies, Stock ETFs Rally as Trump Signals Deal Is Near
top_news.summary: Emerging-market assets got a boost after President Donald Trump canceled planned attacks on Iran, fueling bets that a deal is imminent.

top_news.title: Bank Stocks Hit Record Highs on US-Iran Deal Hopes, IPO Optimism
top_news.summary: Shares of US lenders reached their highest levels ever on Thursday, as investors turned optimistic about a potential deal to stop the fighting in Iran and SpaceX’s record IPO.

top_news.title: Stocks Rally as Trump Signals US-Iran Deal Is Near: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Wall Street powered a rally in stocks as oil sank after President Donald Trump signaled the US is close to a deal with Iran, fueling hopes for an end to the war that has roiled global markets.

top_news.title: SpaceX IPO Raises $75 Billion in Biggest Debut of All Time
top_news.summary: Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow and Bailey Lipschultz break down the final developments from SpaceX as the company prepares to go public with a record-breaking IPO on Friday. Elon Musk's aerospace company raised $75 billion in the IPO, pricing 555.6 million shares at $135 each, according to a statement on its website Thursday.
